scripts.build: npm run validate:content && node scripts/build.mjs && node scripts/build-series.mjs && node scripts/polish-series.mjs && node scripts/remove-editorial-policy.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve dist
scripts.check: npm run validate:content && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/build-series.mjs && node --check scripts/polish-series.mjs && node --check scripts/remove-editorial-policy.mjs
